title: Zoro Cuts Through the War
description: Zoro pushes through the Upper Yard battlefield as Shandia warriors and Enel’s agents continue to fall one by one.
scene: Across pages 22, 23, 24, this scene centers on Luffy, Eneru, Zoro, Braham, Nico Robin. Zoro pushes through the Upper Yard battlefield as Shandia warriors and Enel’s agents continue to fall one by one.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: That's how bad your crime was....!!

summary: Zoro pushes through the Upper Yard battlefield as Shandia warriors and Enel’s agents continue to fall one by one.
